  "text": "## ClickHouse Access Control and Row-Level Security Implementation Audit\n\nThe access control and row-level security implementation in ClickHouse is organized around several core components located in `src/Access/` and related interpreter/parser directories:\n\n### 1. AccessControl Manager and User/Role Resolution\n\nThe **AccessControl** class (`src/Access/AccessControl.h`, `src/Access/AccessControl.cpp`) is the central manager that orchestrates all access control operations. It:\n- Manages multiple access storages (users.xml, disk-based, replicated)\n- Creates and caches context access objects via `getContextAccess()`\n- Manages role resolution through **RoleCache** (`src/Access/RoleCache.h`, `src/Access/RoleCache.cpp`)\n- Handles enabled roles via `getEnabledRoles()` and `getEnabledRolesInfo()` methods\n- Manages row policies through **RowPolicyCache** (`src/Access/RowPolicyCache.h`, `src/Access/RowPolicyCache.cpp`)\n\nThe **User** (`src/Access/User.h`, `src/Access/User.cpp`) and **Role** (`src/Access/Role.h`, `src/Access/Role.cpp`) entities store:\n- Access rights via **AccessRights** (`src/Access/AccessRights.h`, `src/Access/AccessRights.cpp`)\n- Granted roles via **GrantedRoles** (`src/Access/GrantedRoles.h`, `src/Access/GrantedRoles.cpp`)\n- Settings profiles and constraints\n\n### 2. Row-Level Security Policy Implementation\n\nRow policies are implemented through a three-layer architecture:\n\n- **RowPolicy** (`src/Access/RowPolicy.h`, `src/Access/RowPolicy.cpp`): The data structure storing row policy definitions with filters for different operations (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) and restrictive/permissive settings\n\n- **RowPolicyCache** (`src/Access/RowPolicyCache.h`, `src/Access/RowPolicyCache.cpp`): Caches and parses row policies, mixing permissive and restrictive filters via `mixFilters()` and `mixFiltersFor()` methods\n\n- **EnabledRowPolicies** (`src/Access/EnabledRowPolicies.h`, `src/Access/EnabledRowPolicies.cpp`): Provides fast access to row policy filters for a specific user via `getFilter()`, returning **RowPolicyFilter** objects containing parsed AST expressions and policy references\n\n### 3. ContextAccess: Query-Level Permission Checking\n\nThe **ContextAccess** class (`src/Access/ContextAccess.h`, `src/Access/ContextAccess.cpp`) provides:\n- Per-query access control checking via `checkAccess()` methods (supporting database, table, and column-level granularity)\n- Row policy filter retrieval via `getRowPolicyFilter(database, table_name, filter_type)` for query attachment\n- Permission verification with `isGranted()` and `checkGrantOption()` methods\n- User and role information through `getUser()` and `getRolesInfo()`\n- Quota tracking via `getQuota()` and settings via `getDefaultSettings()`\n- **ContextAccessParams** (`src/Access/ContextAccessParams.h`, `src/Access/ContextAccessParams.cpp`) encapsulates access control parameters\n\n### 4. IAccessStorage Interface Hierarchy\n\nThe access control framework uses a pluggable storage architecture through **IAccessStorage** (`src/Access/IAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/IAccessStorage.cpp`):\n\n- **UsersConfigAccessStorage** (`src/Access/UsersConfigAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/UsersConfigAccessStorage.cpp`): Loads access entities from `users.xml` configuration file (read-only)\n\n- **DiskAccessStorage** (`src/Access/DiskAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/DiskAccessStorage.cpp`): Persists access entities to a local directory with background thread for list file writing\n\n- **ReplicatedAccessStorage** (`src/Access/ReplicatedAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/ReplicatedAccessStorage.cpp`): Maintains access entities in ZooKeeper for cluster-wide replication with watching thread for updates\n\n- **MemoryAccessStorage** (`src/Access/MemoryAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/MemoryAccessStorage.cpp`): In-memory storage implementation\n\n- **MultipleAccessStorage** (`src/Access/MultipleAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/MultipleAccessStorage.cpp`): Aggregates multiple storage backends\n\nBase entity interface: **IAccessEntity** (`src/Access/IAccessEntity.h`, `src/Access/IAccessEntity.cpp`)\n\n### 5. GRANT/REVOKE Statement Handling\n\nACL modifications are processed through:\n\n- **InterpreterGrantQuery** (`src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterGrantQuery.h`, `src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterGrantQuery.cpp`): Executes GRANT/REVOKE statements by:\n  - Extracting access rights elements\n  - Calling `updateUserFromQuery()` or `updateRoleFromQuery()` to modify user/role objects\n  - Writing changes back to access storage\n\n- **ASTGrantQuery** (`src/Parsers/Access/ASTGrantQuery.h`, `src/Parsers/Access/ASTGrantQuery.cpp`): AST node representing parsed GRANT/REVOKE statements\n\n- **ParserGrantQuery** (`src/Parsers/Access/ParserGrantQuery.h`, `src/Parsers/Access/ParserGrantQuery.cpp`): Parses GRANT/REVOKE SQL syntax\n\n### Supporting Components\n\n- **EnabledRoles** (`src/Access/EnabledRoles.h`, `src/Access/EnabledRoles.cpp`): Manages effective roles for a user including inherited roles\n\n- **AccessChangesNotifier** (`src/Access/AccessChangesNotifier.h`, `src/Access/AccessChangesNotifier.cpp`): Notifies caches of access entity changes\n\n- **AccessBackup** (`src/Access/AccessBackup.h`, `src/Access/AccessBackup.cpp`): Handles backup/restore of access entities\n\n### Key Design Pattern\n\nThe architecture follows a caching and notification pattern:\n1. AccessControl maintains multiple storage backends and caches\n2. When entities change, AccessChangesNotifier broadcasts updates\n3. RowPolicyCache and RoleCache receive notifications and rebuild indices\n4. ContextAccess queries caches for permission checks and row policy filters\n5. Filters are attached to queries during execution for row-level security enforcement\n"
}

  "text": "## ClickHouse Access Control and Row-Level Security Implementation Audit\n\nThe access control and row-level security implementation in ClickHouse is organized around several core components located in `src/Access/` and related interpreter/parser directories:\n\n### 1. AccessControl Manager and User/Role Resolution\n\nThe **AccessControl** class (`src/Access/AccessControl.h`, `src/Access/AccessControl.cpp`) is the central manager that orchestrates all access control operations. It:\n- Manages multiple access storages (users.xml, disk-based, replicated)\n- Creates and caches context access objects via `getContextAccess()`\n- Manages role resolution through **RoleCache** (`src/Access/RoleCache.h`, `src/Access/RoleCache.cpp`)\n- Handles enabled roles via `getEnabledRoles()` and `getEnabledRolesInfo()` methods\n- Manages row policies through **RowPolicyCache** (`src/Access/RowPolicyCache.h`, `src/Access/RowPolicyCache.cpp`)\n\nThe **User** (`src/Access/User.h`, `src/Access/User.cpp`) and **Role** (`src/Access/Role.h`, `src/Access/Role.cpp`) entities store:\n- Access rights via **AccessRights** (`src/Access/AccessRights.h`, `src/Access/AccessRights.cpp`)\n- Granted roles via **GrantedRoles** (`src/Access/GrantedRoles.h`, `src/Access/GrantedRoles.cpp`)\n- Settings profiles and constraints\n\n### 2. Row-Level Security Policy Implementation\n\nRow policies are implemented through a three-layer architecture:\n\n- **RowPolicy** (`src/Access/RowPolicy.h`, `src/Access/RowPolicy.cpp`): The data structure storing row policy definitions with filters for different operations (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) and restrictive/permissive settings\n\n- **RowPolicyCache** (`src/Access/RowPolicyCache.h`, `src/Access/RowPolicyCache.cpp`): Caches and parses row policies, mixing permissive and restrictive filters via `mixFilters()` and `mixFiltersFor()` methods\n\n- **EnabledRowPolicies** (`src/Access/EnabledRowPolicies.h`, `src/Access/EnabledRowPolicies.cpp`): Provides fast access to row policy filters for a specific user via `getFilter()`, returning **RowPolicyFilter** objects containing parsed AST expressions and policy references\n\n### 3. ContextAccess: Query-Level Permission Checking\n\nThe **ContextAccess** class (`src/Access/ContextAccess.h`, `src/Access/ContextAccess.cpp`) provides:\n- Per-query access control checking via `checkAccess()` methods (supporting database, table, and column-level granularity)\n- Row policy filter retrieval via `getRowPolicyFilter(database, table_name, filter_type)` for query attachment\n- Permission verification with `isGranted()` and `checkGrantOption()` methods\n- User and role information through `getUser()` and `getRolesInfo()`\n- Quota tracking via `getQuota()` and settings via `getDefaultSettings()`\n- **ContextAccessParams** (`src/Access/ContextAccessParams.h`, `src/Access/ContextAccessParams.cpp`) encapsulates access control parameters\n\n### 4. IAccessStorage Interface Hierarchy\n\nThe access control framework uses a pluggable storage architecture through **IAccessStorage** (`src/Access/IAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/IAccessStorage.cpp`):\n\n- **UsersConfigAccessStorage** (`src/Access/UsersConfigAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/UsersConfigAccessStorage.cpp`): Loads access entities from `users.xml` configuration file (read-only)\n\n- **DiskAccessStorage** (`src/Access/DiskAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/DiskAccessStorage.cpp`): Persists access entities to a local directory with background thread for list file writing\n\n- **ReplicatedAccessStorage** (`src/Access/ReplicatedAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/ReplicatedAccessStorage.cpp`): Maintains access entities in ZooKeeper for cluster-wide replication with watching thread for updates\n\n- **MemoryAccessStorage** (`src/Access/MemoryAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/MemoryAccessStorage.cpp`): In-memory storage implementation\n\n- **MultipleAccessStorage** (`src/Access/MultipleAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/MultipleAccessStorage.cpp`): Aggregates multiple storage backends\n\nBase entity interface: **IAccessEntity** (`src/Access/IAccessEntity.h`, `src/Access/IAccessEntity.cpp`)\n\n### 5. GRANT/REVOKE Statement Handling\n\nACL modifications are processed through:\n\n- **InterpreterGrantQuery** (`src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterGrantQuery.h`, `src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterGrantQuery.cpp`): Executes GRANT/REVOKE statements by:\n  - Extracting access rights elements\n  - Calling `updateUserFromQuery()` or `updateRoleFromQuery()` to modify user/role objects\n  - Writing changes back to access storage\n\n- **ASTGrantQuery** (`src/Parsers/Access/ASTGrantQuery.h`, `src/Parsers/Access/ASTGrantQuery.cpp`): AST node representing parsed GRANT/REVOKE statements\n\n- **ParserGrantQuery** (`src/Parsers/Access/ParserGrantQuery.h`, `src/Parsers/Access/ParserGrantQuery.cpp`): Parses GRANT/REVOKE SQL syntax\n\n### Supporting Components\n\n- **EnabledRoles** (`src/Access/EnabledRoles.h`, `src/Access/EnabledRoles.cpp`): Manages effective roles for a user including inherited roles\n\n- **AccessChangesNotifier** (`src/Access/AccessChangesNotifier.h`, `src/Access/AccessChangesNotifier.cpp`): Notifies caches of access entity changes\n\n- **AccessBackup** (`src/Access/AccessBackup.h`, `src/Access/AccessBackup.cpp`): Handles backup/restore of access entities\n\n### Key Design Pattern\n\nThe architecture follows a caching and notification pattern:\n1. AccessControl maintains multiple storage backends and caches\n2. When entities change, AccessChangesNotifier broadcasts updates\n3. RowPolicyCache and RoleCache receive notifications and rebuild indices\n4. ContextAccess queries caches for permission checks and row policy filters\n5. Filters are attached to queries during execution for row-level security enforcement\n"
}

  "text": "## ClickHouse Access Control and Row-Level Security Implementation Audit\n\nThe access control and row-level security implementation in ClickHouse is organized around several core components located in `src/Access/` and related interpreter/parser directories:\n\n### 1. AccessControl Manager and User/Role Resolution\n\nThe **AccessControl** class (`src/Access/AccessControl.h`, `src/Access/AccessControl.cpp`) is the central manager that orchestrates all access control operations. It:\n- Manages multiple access storages (users.xml, disk-based, replicated)\n- Creates and caches context access objects via `getContextAccess()`\n- Manages role resolution through **RoleCache** (`src/Access/RoleCache.h`, `src/Access/RoleCache.cpp`)\n- Handles enabled roles via `getEnabledRoles()` and `getEnabledRolesInfo()` methods\n- Manages row policies through **RowPolicyCache** (`src/Access/RowPolicyCache.h`, `src/Access/RowPolicyCache.cpp`)\n\nThe **User** (`src/Access/User.h`, `src/Access/User.cpp`) and **Role** (`src/Access/Role.h`, `src/Access/Role.cpp`) entities store:\n- Access rights via **AccessRights** (`src/Access/AccessRights.h`, `src/Access/AccessRights.cpp`)\n- Granted roles via **GrantedRoles** (`src/Access/GrantedRoles.h`, `src/Access/GrantedRoles.cpp`)\n- Settings profiles and constraints\n\n### 2. Row-Level Security Policy Implementation\n\nRow policies are implemented through a three-layer architecture:\n\n- **RowPolicy** (`src/Access/RowPolicy.h`, `src/Access/RowPolicy.cpp`): The data structure storing row policy definitions with filters for different operations (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) and restrictive/permissive settings\n\n- **RowPolicyCache** (`src/Access/RowPolicyCache.h`, `src/Access/RowPolicyCache.cpp`): Caches and parses row policies, mixing permissive and restrictive filters via `mixFilters()` and `mixFiltersFor()` methods\n\n- **EnabledRowPolicies** (`src/Access/EnabledRowPolicies.h`, `src/Access/EnabledRowPolicies.cpp`): Provides fast access to row policy filters for a specific user via `getFilter()`, returning **RowPolicyFilter** objects containing parsed AST expressions and policy references\n\n### 3. ContextAccess: Query-Level Permission Checking\n\nThe **ContextAccess** class (`src/Access/ContextAccess.h`, `src/Access/ContextAccess.cpp`) provides:\n- Per-query access control checking via `checkAccess()` methods (supporting database, table, and column-level granularity)\n- Row policy filter retrieval via `getRowPolicyFilter(database, table_name, filter_type)` for query attachment\n- Permission verification with `isGranted()` and `checkGrantOption()` methods\n- User and role information through `getUser()` and `getRolesInfo()`\n- Quota tracking via `getQuota()` and settings via `getDefaultSettings()`\n- **ContextAccessParams** (`src/Access/ContextAccessParams.h`, `src/Access/ContextAccessParams.cpp`) encapsulates access control parameters\n\n### 4. IAccessStorage Interface Hierarchy\n\nThe access control framework uses a pluggable storage architecture through **IAccessStorage** (`src/Access/IAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/IAccessStorage.cpp`):\n\n- **UsersConfigAccessStorage** (`src/Access/UsersConfigAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/UsersConfigAccessStorage.cpp`): Loads access entities from `users.xml` configuration file (read-only)\n\n- **DiskAccessStorage** (`src/Access/DiskAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/DiskAccessStorage.cpp`): Persists access entities to a local directory with background thread for list file writing\n\n- **ReplicatedAccessStorage** (`src/Access/ReplicatedAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/ReplicatedAccessStorage.cpp`): Maintains access entities in ZooKeeper for cluster-wide replication with watching thread for updates\n\n- **MemoryAccessStorage** (`src/Access/MemoryAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/MemoryAccessStorage.cpp`): In-memory storage implementation\n\n- **MultipleAccessStorage** (`src/Access/MultipleAccessStorage.h`, `src/Access/MultipleAccessStorage.cpp`): Aggregates multiple storage backends\n\nBase entity interface: **IAccessEntity** (`src/Access/IAccessEntity.h`, `src/Access/IAccessEntity.cpp`)\n\n### 5. GRANT/REVOKE Statement Handling\n\nACL modifications are processed through:\n\n- **InterpreterGrantQuery** (`src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterGrantQuery.h`, `src/Interpreters/Access/InterpreterGrantQuery.cpp`): Executes GRANT/REVOKE statements by:\n  - Extracting access rights elements\n  - Calling `updateUserFromQuery()` or `updateRoleFromQuery()` to modify user/role objects\n  - Writing changes back to access storage\n\n- **ASTGrantQuery** (`src/Parsers/Access/ASTGrantQuery.h`, `src/Parsers/Access/ASTGrantQuery.cpp`): AST node representing parsed GRANT/REVOKE statements\n\n- **ParserGrantQuery** (`src/Parsers/Access/ParserGrantQuery.h`, `src/Parsers/Access/ParserGrantQuery.cpp`): Parses GRANT/REVOKE SQL syntax\n\n### Supporting Components\n\n- **EnabledRoles** (`src/Access/EnabledRoles.h`, `src/Access/EnabledRoles.cpp`): Manages effective roles for a user including inherited roles\n\n- **AccessChangesNotifier** (`src/Access/AccessChangesNotifier.h`, `src/Access/AccessChangesNotifier.cpp`): Notifies caches of access entity changes\n\n- **AccessBackup** (`src/Access/AccessBackup.h`, `src/Access/AccessBackup.cpp`): Handles backup/restore of access entities\n\n### Key Design Pattern\n\nThe architecture follows a caching and notification pattern:\n1. AccessControl maintains multiple storage backends and caches\n2. When entities change, AccessChangesNotifier broadcasts updates\n3. RowPolicyCache and RoleCache receive notifications and rebuild indices\n4. ContextAccess queries caches for permission checks and row policy filters\n5. Filters are attached to queries during execution for row-level security enforcement\n"
